title: rubus vulgaris var. vestitus
intro: Rubus vulgaris var. vestitus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan bramble, is a plant species in the rose family that is native to the Himalayan region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus vulgaris var. vestitus include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
